instant.$description: Press settle on buttons (translateY 1px). Tightest tap feedback.

base.$description: Button release-bounce, modal exit, dropdown enter, toast exit.

moderate.$description: Default transition — button hover lift, switch toggle, tab indicator slide, modal enter, toast enter.

slow.$description: Larger reveals, panel slides, page transitions.

donut-sweep.$description: DonutChart V2 entrance — total envelope for the by-magnitude descending stagger sequence. Source: DECISIONS.md «DonutChart anatomy + interaction» call 2.

donut-slice-fade.$description: DonutChart V2 entrance — per-slice fade-in duration. Combined with donut-sweep (600ms) and n=5 yields a 105 ms stagger.

deliberate.$description: Section-to-section paint-drip transition (candy register). Source: PROVEDO_DESIGN_SYSTEM_v2.md §5.2 dur-deliberate.

default.$description: ease-out-expo — Mercury-Stripe register. Default for hover lift, switch, tab indicator, modal enter.

out.$description: Release bounce, dropdown enter, modal enter (alt to exp-out).

exp-out.$description: Alias for default — exponential-out reads as Mercury cadence.

spring-soft.$description: Soft overshoot for candy CTA hover lift + paint-drip reveal. Source: PROVEDO_DESIGN_SYSTEM_v2.md §5.1 ease-spring-soft.

press.$description: Symmetric curve for button depress on click — net effect of a stamp. Source: PROVEDO_DESIGN_SYSTEM_v2.md §5.1 ease-press.
